programmes.show_description: In Divine Proportion: The two detectives from opposite ends of the social spectrum team up once again to solve a grisly murder case. A village woman is killed with a shotgun.
Cheques and Balances: Classic TV in every sense with the vets of pre-war Yorkshire. Siegfried is determined to make the farmers pay bills and he assigns James to skinflint Biggins.
Business: Comic sibling rivalry in Chigwell. The sisters fall out when Sharon takes on Chris's inheritance - a Greek cafe! Tracey is recruited to work as a skivvy.
The Saloon Killer: Part 1: An exhausted Micki faces her toughest case yet when she is brought on board to find a shooter responsible for randomly murdering sixteen people.
Shopping from Home.
Shopping from Home.
Old Friends: Sitcom with those Essex sisters. Tracey invites an old schoolfriend to stay in the guest room. As the pair relive their past adventures, Sharon begins to feel deserted.
Parting: Time for a cuppa with Chigwell's most famous sisters. Sharon is faced with an impossible choice when her husband, Chris, tells her he is seriously ill.
Jobs for the Girls: Chigwell comedy with the Essex girls. Sharon and Tracey want spending money for Christmas, so they take up some extra work to pay for last minute presents.
Kids: Drama with the raffish antiques dealer. Susan appears at a country-house auction to tell Lovejoy that their daughter has vanished. Tinker, Eric and Jane go shopping.
Members Only: Quirky drama with the antiques dealer. The local golf club closes ranks when Lovejoy discovers their prize cup is a fake, leading to Lady Jane's expulsion.
Highland Fling - Part One: Quirky drama with the loveable antiques dealer. A visit to a Gothic house in Scotland brings Lovejoy and Lady Jane closer together.
The Jackdaw's Revenge: The amateur sleuth struggles to protect those closest to him when an old foe is unexpectedly released from prison.
Old Fossils: Crime caper with the experienced detectives. James Bolam, Amanda Redman and team probe the death of a palaeontologist at the Natural History Museum.
End of the Line: Another mystery for James Bolam, Dennis Waterman and friends. The detectives reinvestigate the murder of a vagrant strangled on a tube train 15 years ago.
The Omega Man: The offbeat mystery series starring Alan Davies and Caroline Quentin. Jonathan's services are enlisted by the US government when an alien skeleton disappears.
Murder in the Dark: Part One: When a man is killed at her university reunion, Becks finds herself on the wrong side of an investigation. Was a friend responsible or did someone break in?
Murder in the Dark: Part Two: As Judith and Suzie work with the police to find the killer, tensions rise among Becks' friends in the house. Guest starring Harry Enfield.
Motorcycle Mamas: An all-women motorcycle club are in Brokenwood for the wedding of one of their members, but a murder casts suspicion amongst their ranks and throws the town into chaos.
Chandler and the team investigate two macabre executions that seem to have been carried out by a witch hunter.
The Seed of Cunning: Can't-tear-your-eyes-away murder mystery with the unlikely detective duo. Lynley and Havers investigate death and conspiracy at the House of Lords.
Old Fossils: Crime caper with the experienced detectives. James Bolam, Amanda Redman and team probe the death of a palaeontologist at the Natural History Museum.
Scoop: The body of a high-level government official's secretary is found at the bottom of a staircase - and Sister Boniface claims she was dead before the fall.
Smoke and Mirrors: Final Chapter: Despite Mattie's objections, Beth and Cat continue to pursue leads on their own, while the theatre company is forced to change the cast around.
Shopping from Home.
Shopping from Home.
Money For Nothing: When the Sun Hill team form a syndicate to buy a greyhound, Quinnan's Jenny discovers she is part of it.
A Night to Forget: Quinnan's stag night is being organised by Hollis, so will anything go right? The evening certainly promises a few surprises!
A Day to Remember: What could possibly go wrong on Quinnan's wedding day? Garfield's unexpected reappearance is only the beginning!
Judgement Day: Lennox and Rawton are drawn closer together when a dangerous ghost from Rawton's past returns to haunt her.
Haunted: The Sun Hill CID must deal with ghosts, clairvoyants and messages from beyond the grave.
Dr Turner helps a couple whose daughter was born without limbs to have her fitted for prosthetics - but the experience provokes different reactions from her mother and father.
Sister Julienne oversees the opening of a family planning clinic at the local community centre, leading a mother of three to start taking the contraceptive pill behind her husband's back.
Feature-length historical drama from the world-famous romantic author, Catherine Cookson. The Christmas of 1913 brings changes for disenchanted young Agnes Conway.
In 1818, Sharpe and Sgt Major Harper accompany a motley crew of soldiers and a headstrong woman through India.
Love and Other Puzzles: When local resident Hillary is found dead, face covered in cold cream next to an unfinished jigsaw, it becomes clear to Boniface a pattern's forming across cases.
Life Licence: Emilia Fox stars in a feature-length forensics mystery. When an ex-convict is killed in his home, the team meet a psychologist who works with murderers.
